targets.rawSql: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX("timestamp") AS ts FROM cross_venue_spreads) SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Count" FROM cross_venue_spreads s JOIN latest l ON s."timestamp" = l.ts WHERE s.abs_spread_bps > 12
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX("timestamp") AS ts FROM cross_venue_spreads) SELECT ROUND(MAX(abs_spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Max bps" FROM cross_venue_spreads s JOIN latest l ON s."timestamp" = l.ts
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX("timestamp") AS ts FROM cross_venue_spreads) SELECT ROUND(AVG(abs_spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg bps" FROM cross_venue_spreads s JOIN latest l ON s."timestamp" = l.ts
WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX("timestamp") AS ts FROM cross_venue_spreads) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT asset) AS "Assets" FROM cross_venue_spreads s JOIN latest l ON s."timestamp" = l.ts

WITH top_assets AS (SELECT asset FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz GROUP BY asset ORDER BY AVG(abs_spread_bps) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT s."timestamp" AS time, s.asset AS metric, s.spread_bps::float AS value FROM cross_venue_spreads s JOIN top_assets t ON t.asset = s.asset WHERE s."timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz ORDER BY time

SELECT date_trunc('minute', "timestamp") AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT asset) AS "Assets >12bps" FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE abs_spread_bps > 12 AND "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX("timestamp") AS ts FROM cross_venue_spreads) SELECT s.asset AS "Asset", s.binance_symbol AS "Binance Pair", ROUND(s.spread_bps::numeric, 1) AS "Spread (bps)", ROUND(s.abs_spread_bps::numeric, 1) AS "Abs Spread", ROUND(s.hl_mid::numeric, 6) AS "HL Mid", ROUND(s.binance_mid::numeric, 6) AS "Binance Mid", CASE WHEN s.spread_bps > 0 THEN 'HL premium' ELSE 'Binance premium' END AS "Direction" FROM cross_venue_spreads s JOIN latest l ON s."timestamp" = l.ts ORDER BY s.abs_spread_bps DESC
SELECT spread_bps::float AS "Spread" FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz

SELECT asset AS "Asset", COUNT(*) AS "Samples", ROUND(AVG(spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Spread", ROUND(AVG(abs_spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Abs Spread", ROUND(MIN(spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Min", ROUND(MAX(spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "Max", ROUND(STDDEV(spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS "StdDev" FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz GROUP BY asset HAVING AVG(abs_spread_bps) > 10 ORDER BY AVG(abs_spread_bps) DESC

panels.title: Spread Episodes >12bps (how long each stays open)

targets.rawSql: WITH numbered AS (SELECT asset, "timestamp", spread_bps, abs_spread_bps, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset ORDER BY "timestamp") - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset, (abs_spread_bps > 12)::int ORDER BY "timestamp") AS grp FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz), episodes AS (SELECT asset, grp, MIN("timestamp") AS start_time, MAX("timestamp") AS end_time, COUNT(*) AS ticks, ROUND(AVG(spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS avg_spread, ROUND(MAX(abs_spread_bps)::numeric, 1) AS peak_spread, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX("timestamp") - MIN("timestamp")) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM numbered WHERE abs_spread_bps > 12 GROUP BY asset, grp HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) SELECT asset AS "Asset", start_time AS "Start", ROUND(duration_min::numeric, 0) AS "Duration (min)", ticks AS "Ticks", avg_spread AS "Avg Spread (bps)", peak_spread AS "Peak (bps)" FROM episodes ORDER BY duration_min DESC LIMIT 50

WITH numbered AS (SELECT asset, "timestamp", abs_spread_bps, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset ORDER BY "timestamp") - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset, (abs_spread_bps > 12)::int ORDER BY "timestamp") AS grp FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz), episodes AS (SELECT asset, grp, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX("timestamp") - MIN("timestamp")) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM numbered WHERE abs_spread_bps > 12 GROUP BY asset, grp HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) SELECT ROUND(AVG(duration_min)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Min" FROM episodes

WITH numbered AS (SELECT asset, "timestamp", abs_spread_bps, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset ORDER BY "timestamp") - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset, (abs_spread_bps > 12)::int ORDER BY "timestamp") AS grp FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz), episodes AS (SELECT asset, grp FROM numbered WHERE abs_spread_bps > 12 GROUP BY asset, grp HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Episodes" FROM episodes

WITH numbered AS (SELECT asset, "timestamp", abs_spread_bps, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset ORDER BY "timestamp") - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY asset, (abs_spread_bps > 12)::int ORDER BY "timestamp") AS grp FROM cross_venue_spreads WHERE "timestamp" BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AND $__timeTo()::timestamptz), episodes AS (SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM MAX("timestamp") - MIN("timestamp")) / 60.0 AS duration_min FROM numbered WHERE abs_spread_bps > 12 GROUP BY asset, grp HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) SELECT ROUND(MAX(duration_min)::numeric, 0) AS "Max Min" FROM episodes
